content.situation: 在商务会议开始前，对方主动问候并表达期待见面的喜悦
content.speakerText: It's such a pleasure to finally connect with you face to face!
content.speakerTextCn: 终于能当面与你见面，真是太好了！
content.responseTemplate: ___! The journey was smooth and I'm really looking forward to our discussion.
content.hint: 回应对方的积极情绪时，常用 'Same here' 表示‘我也是’，保持语气自然友好
content.knowledgePoint: 寒暄回应中的情感对等表达

content.situation: 与新同事在茶水间偶遇，对方微笑打招呼并询问近况
content.speakerText: Hey there! How have you been lately?
content.responseTemplate: ___! Just getting settled in, but everything's going well so far.
content.hint: 在非正式但友好的场合，'Not bad' 是自然且常见的回应，比 'I'm fine' 更显轻松
content.knowledgePoint: 日常寒暄中的非正式积极回应

content.situation: 会议开始前，对方表达对合作的期待，希望建立良好关系
content.speakerText: I really hope we can build something meaningful together.
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很希望我们能共同建立一些有意义的东西。
content.responseTemplate: ___ — I think our teams have a lot of potential to work closely.
content.hint: 表达强烈认同对方的合作意愿时，'Absolutely' 是最自然、最积极的回应词
content.knowledgePoint: 表达合作意愿时的肯定性回应
